task: Write a Python function that extracts the AWS account ID from an ARN string (e.g., 'arn:aws:s3:::my-bucket/my-key')
Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy allowing read-only access to a specific S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket'
Write a regular expression that validates AWS S3 bucket names (must be 3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only, cannot start or end with a hyphen)
